SpaceX, owned by Elon Musk, is seeking $5 billion in funding from the Public Investment Fund (PIF) as a major stake in its initial public offering. 

The company aims to raise $75 billion in an offering that could surpass Aramco in 2019 and Alibaba in 2014. 

The deal is still under negotiation with no final decision, amid interest from major investors ahead of the listing.

html: Reserve Bank of India @RBI has approved @EmiratesNBD_AE plan to acquire up to 74% stake in @rblbank for $3 billion. This marks a major milestone, as it could become one of the largest foreign bank investments in India. The deal comes with key regulatory relaxations, signaling RBI’s confidence in strengthening the banking sector. For RBL Bank, this move may bring stability, fresh capital, and global expertise, opening a new chapter of growth and renewed trust. #BankingSector #RBI #ForeignInvestment #10Takka #10TakkaUpdates
text_1:

This marks a major milestone, as it could become one of the largest foreign bank investments in India. The deal comes with key regulatory relaxations, signaling RBI’s confidence in strengthening the banking sector. For RBL Bank, this move may bring stability, fresh capital, and global expertise, opening a new chapter of growth and renewed trust.

text: Dubai update from meetmagic https://t.co/4dCvQSxXG0
html: F*ck the war ! We have confirmed Mike Phillips Welsh Ruby royalty, along with senior exec leaders from Emirates NBD, Talabat, Rakuten, IFFCO Group, PwC, Gulf News and Core42. The current environment here has understandably slowed vendor investment in go-to-market activity down, but I believe it has also created a very real opportunity. I started meetmagic during Covid, when physical meetings stopped but business momentum still needed to continue. In one year in Sydney, we grew from 30 executives to 500 and increased charitable giving from $23,000 to more than $800,000. That was the moment I realised meetmagic is built for periods like this, when traditional routes slow down but the need for progress remains. That is why I believe what we do matters now. We have had difficulty securing a sponsor for our first exec event In Dubai but we are continuing to move forward. We will donate AED 1,000 to @DubaiCares for each attendee which means the dinner will support 2200 kids to get a life changing education. The amount is modest, but the outcome and principle is just as powerful. just like COVID, It shows that business momentum and community contribution can sit side by side Im proud that our team has made this happen and especially proud of all the execs who are turning up.. In a war!
text_1:
F*ck the war ! We have confirmed Mike Phillips Welsh Ruby royalty, along with senior exec leaders from Emirates NBD, Talabat, Rakuten, IFFCO Group, PwC, Gulf News and Core42. 

The current environment here has understandably slowed vendor investment in go-to-market activity down, but I believe it has also created a very real opportunity.

I started meetmagic during Covid, when physical meetings stopped but business momentum still needed to continue. 

In one year in Sydney, we grew from 30 executives to 500 and increased charitable giving from $23,000 to more than $800,000. 

That was the moment I realised meetmagic is built for periods like this, when traditional routes slow down but the need for progress remains.

That is why I believe what we do matters now.

We have had difficulty securing a sponsor for our first exec event In Dubai but we are continuing to move forward. 

We will donate AED 1,000 to @DubaiCares for each attendee which means the dinner will support 2200 kids to get a life changing education. 

The amount is modest, but the outcome and principle is just as powerful.

just like COVID, It shows that business momentum and community contribution can sit side by side 

Im proud that our team has made this happen and especially proud of all the execs who are turning up.. 

In a war!

Emirates NBD has received RBI approval to acquire up to 74% stake in RBL Bank, making it a foreign bank post-acquisition. Voting rights will be capped at 26%.

post:
Economy | Bullish

The rupee surged to 92.82, marking its highest single-day gain since 2013. It closed at 93.1050, achieving its highest percentage gain in a single day since September 2013. This follows the Reserve Bank of India's foreign exchange restrictions.

The significant gain may alleviate pressure on imports, especially crude oil, which has been a major factor in India's current account deficit.

post:
The US is imposing a 100% tariff on imported patented drugs unless manufacturers sign a pricing deal or move production to the US; the tariff will be reduced to 15% for Europe, Japan, South Korea, and Switzerland through trade deals - US official. 

Large pharmaceutical companies have 120 days, and smaller companies have 180 days to avoid the tariff; the US has made 17 pharmaceutical deals, with 13 signed and 4 under negotiation - US official.

Emirates NBD Bank (P.J.S.C) has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India on April 1, 2026, to acquire up to 74% of the paid-up share capital of RBL Bank Ltd. post:
SOURCES SAY

RBL Bank is likely to have received approval from the Reserve Bank of India for a stake sale to Emirates NBD.

The deal now awaits approval from the Securities and Exchange Board of India.

Sebi clearance is likely to trigger a mandatory open offer for shareholders.

The open offer could be launched in two weeks after approvals.

The deal is part of a larger plan for Emirates NBD to acquire a significant stake in RBL Bank.

text: RBL BANK: CO GETS RBI NOD FOR EMIRATES NBD DEAL - NDTV PROFIT
html:
RBL Bank has received RBI approval for Dubai-based Emirates NBD to acquire a 60% controlling stake via a ~$3 billion (₹26,850 cr) fresh capital infusion through preferential shares.

Key points:
- Deal announced Oct 2025; largest cross-border FDI in Indian banking.
- Includes open offer + amalgamation of Emirates NBD's India branches into RBL.
- Prior nods: CCI (Jan 2026), UAE central bank (Mar 2026).
- Boosts RBL's capital, tech, and global reach (esp. remittances/wealth mgmt). Expected close in coming months.

Big positive for the bank!
